g.title: Core components for simulating network topology and churn

ul.li: Page Boundary: Bold line indicates 4KB alignment potential

Colors:
Blue: Header / Identity
Orange: Pointer / Heap Reference
Green: Size / Capacity Metadata
Gray: Timestamp / Payload Scheduling

g.title: Invariant: Node exists in Harness registry but socket not bound.
Invariant: Gossip goroutines active, transport accepting packets.
Invariant: State preserved, but all ingress/egress dropped.
